description_long: This is a modern two-story house featuring a flat roof and a combination of glass, metal, and concrete materials. The structure includes expansive floor-to-ceiling windows, multiple balconies with glass railings, and a rooftop green space. The house is set on a large platform with a wooden deck, an outdoor pool, and landscaped areas with trees. There is a prominent staircase leading to the upper level and a covered carport on one side. The design emphasizes open, airy spaces and strong geometric lines, with outdoor living areas seamlessly integrated into the architecture. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with a focus on natural light and outdoor connectivity.
description: A sleek, modern two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, balconies, a rooftop garden, and an outdoor pool on a spacious deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main glass facade, balconies, rooftop garden, and carport.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the staircase, upper balcony, and pool area with outdoor seating.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, extensive deck, and large windows opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, deck, and secondary glass facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass walls
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide glass door, steps, and a covered porch integrated into the facade with minimalistic detailing.
